Z.sentence_pinyin: xiāng zi yǐ jīng gòu zhòng de le ！
Z.sentence_meaning: The box is already heavy enough!

Z.sentence: 找出第二天要学习的重点。
Z.sentence_pinyin: zhǎo chū dì èr tiān yào xué xí de zhòng diǎn 。
Z.sentence_meaning: Find out what you want to study the next day.

Z.sentence: 我们应该重视平时的积累。
Z.sentence_pinyin: wǒ men yīng gāi zhòng shì píng shí de jī lěi 。
Z.sentence_meaning: We should pay attention to our daily accumulation.

Z.sentence: 我们还要经常跟周围的人交流。
Z.sentence_pinyin: wǒ men hái yào jīng cháng gēn zhōu wéi de rén jiāo liú 。
Z.sentence_meaning: We also need to communicate frequently with the people around us.

Z.sentence: 跟警察一起抓住了一个坏人。
Z.sentence_pinyin: gēn jǐng chá yì qǐ zhuā zhù le yí gè huài rén 。
Z.sentence_meaning: Caught a bad guy with the police.

Z.sentence: 不要太急着赚钱。
Z.sentence_pinyin: bú yào tài jí zhe zhuàn qián 。
Z.sentence_meaning: Don't be too eager to make money.

Z.sentence: 最后头再向右转一下。
Z.sentence_pinyin: zuì hòu tou zài xiàng yòu zhuǎn yī xià 。
Z.sentence_meaning: Finally, turn your head to the right again.

Z.sentence: 张远还专门从国外飞回来呢。
Z.sentence_pinyin: zhāng yuǎn hái zhuān mén cóng guó wài fēi huí lái ne 。
Z.sentence_meaning: Zhang Yuan even flew back from abroad.

Z.sentence: 因为我学的就是法律专业。
Z.sentence_pinyin: yīn wèi wǒ xué de jiù shì fǎ lǜ zhuān yè 。
Z.sentence_meaning: Because I majored in law.

Z.sentence: 祝贺她考试成绩都合。
Z.sentence_pinyin: zhù hè tā kǎo shì chéng jì dōu hé 。
Z.sentence_meaning: Congratulations to her on all the test scores.

Z.sentence: 无论是普通杂志，还是著名小说……
Z.sentence_pinyin: wú lùn shì pǔ tōng zá zhì ， hái shì zhù míng xiǎo shuō ……
Z.sentence_meaning: Whether it's an ordinary magazine or a famous novel...

Z.sentence: 很多句子说得都不太准确。
Z.sentence_pinyin: hěn duō jù zi shuō dé dōu bù tài zhǔn què 。
Z.sentence_meaning: Many sentences are not quite accurate.

Z.sentence: 如果第一次见面给别人留下像不准时这样的坏印象……
Z.sentence_pinyin: rú guǒ dì yī cì jiàn miàn gěi bié rén liú xià xiàng bù zhǔn shí zhè yàng de huài yìn xiàng ……
Z.sentence_meaning: If your first meeting leaves a bad impression on others like not being on time...

Z.sentence: 但是你刚才的话让我改变了主意。
Z.sentence_pinyin: dàn shì nǐ gāng cái de huà ràng wǒ gǎi biàn le zhǔ yì 。
Z.sentence_meaning: But what you just said made me change my mind.

Z.sentence: 人们就会很自然地想起爱情。
Z.sentence_pinyin: rén men jiù huì hěn zì rán dì xiǎng qǐ ài qíng 。
Z.sentence_meaning: People will naturally think of love.

Z.sentence: 仔细考虑一下。
Z.sentence_pinyin: zǐ xì kǎo lǜ yī xià 。
Z.sentence_meaning: Think about it carefully.

Z.sentence: 越说越自信。
Z.sentence_pinyin: yuè shuō yuè zì xìn 。
Z.sentence_meaning: The more you speak, the more confident you become.

Z.sentence: 从失败中总结出有用的经验。
Z.sentence_pinyin: cóng shī bài zhōng zǒng jié chū yǒu yòng de jīng yàn 。
Z.sentence_meaning: Learn useful lessons from failures.

Z.sentence: 马克去游年租的房子离马路很近。
Z.sentence_pinyin: mǎ kè qù yóu nián zū de fáng zi lí mǎ lù hěn jìn 。
Z.sentence_meaning: The house Mark rented for his vacation was very close to the road.

Z.sentence: 两个人在一起，最好能有共同的兴趣和爱好。
Z.sentence_pinyin: liǎng gè rén zài yì qǐ ， zuì hǎo néng yǒu gòng tóng de xìng qù hé ài hào 。
Z.sentence_meaning: When two people are together, it is best to have common interests and hobbies.

Z.sentence: 这样在这个得到别人的尊重。
Z.sentence_pinyin: zhè yàng zài zhè ge dé dào bié rén de zūn zhòng 。
Z.sentence_meaning: This way you gain respect from others here.

Z.sentence: 梦到自己正在一座桥上走。
Z.sentence_pinyin: mèng dào zì jǐ zhèng zài yī zuò qiáo shàng zǒu 。
Z.sentence_meaning: I dreamed that I was walking on a bridge.

Z.sentence: 她现在已经是一个有名的作家了。
Z.sentence_pinyin: tā xiàn zài yǐ jīng shì yí gè yǒu míng de zuò jiā le 。
Z.sentence_meaning: She is now a famous writer.

Z.sentence: 不要躺在座位上。
Z.sentence_pinyin: bú yào tǎng zài zuò wèi shàng 。
Z.sentence_meaning: Don't lie down on the seat.

Z.sentence: 我第一次听说盐有保护衣服颜色的作用。
Z.sentence_pinyin: wǒ dì yī cì tīng shuō yán yǒu bǎo hù yī fú yán sè de zuò yòng 。
Z.sentence_meaning: This is the first time I heard that salt can protect the color of clothes.

Z.sentence: 七岁左右的儿童普遍好动。
Z.sentence_pinyin: qī suì zuǒ yòu de ér tóng pǔ biàn hào dòng 。
Z.sentence_meaning: Children around the age of seven are generally active.

Z.sentence: 我想请作者谈谈关于这个电影的看法。
Z.sentence_pinyin: wǒ xiǎng qǐng zuò zhě tán tán guān yú zhè ge diàn yǐng de kàn fǎ 。
Z.sentence_meaning: I would like to ask the author to share his thoughts on this movie.
